summary: Super‑fine Providence show captured on an excellent soundboard recording with standout Althea, China Doll/High Time and a ripping second set.
review: The reviewer raves about both the performance and the tape, calling it a “very fine recording from Mr. Hill” and highlighting the great playing throughout the two‑night run in Providence. Specific songs such as Althea, China Doll/High Time, Playing in the Band and Wharf Rat are singled out as highlights, especially in an outstanding second set.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and recording quality, indicating an exceptional show with excellent sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the tape as a “very fine recording” with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Whole show praised as great; second set especially highlighted for its energy and song flow.
